title: Fluffy Croatian Brown Rice Pilaf
description: A nutty and silky Croatian dish featuring brown rice, this pilaf is a cozy and comforting meal option, made without onions or garlic for a friendly flavor profile.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add the carrots and cook for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the brown rice and stir to coat the rice with the tomato paste and oil.
Add the chicken broth, thyme, salt, and pepper, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 40 minutes, or until the liquid is absorbed and the rice is tender.
Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes before fluffing with a fork.
